cases.input: Run the trend-scan skill on the topic "Notion AI" over the last 30 days, single mode, standalone with no client slug. Scan public communities, rank by engagement, and write the findings deliverable.
must: scopes the scan to the requested 30-day window and says which platforms were scanned
ranks items by each platform's native engagement signal (upvotes, points, likes, stars, views) with the real metric recorded next to each
weaves in at least two verbatim community quotes, each attributed to a handle or username, platform, date, and link
clusters the same story across platforms into named themes rather than dumping a raw list of posts
ties each business implication back to the sources it rests on
stays draft-only and invents no quote, username, or engagement number

dimensions.name: source diversity
dimensions.desc: signal is pulled from several distinct communities (Reddit, Hacker News, YouTube, X, GitHub) rather than leaning on one platform

dimensions.name: recency
dimensions.desc: items sit inside the requested window, each carries a date, and anything older is labeled as context rather than passed off as current

dimensions.name: quote faithfulness
dimensions.desc: quotes read as genuine verbatim community language and are fully attributed (handle, platform, date, link), never paraphrased and dressed up as a quote

dimensions.name: engagement ranking
dimensions.desc: the loudest items lead, each with its real native metric, and ordering reflects actual signal rather than arbitrary placement

dimensions.name: synthesis over dump
dimensions.desc: the output clusters posts into named themes with a pattern and an implication, instead of listing raw threads back to back

cases.input: Run the trend-scan skill in comparison mode on "Linear vs Jira" over the last 90 days, focus angle on reliability and pricing, standalone with no client slug. Produce the head-to-head findings deliverable.
must: resolves each entity separately, then merges the two reads into a head-to-head with a per-dimension verdict
covers the requested reliability and pricing angles with community signal on each side
weaves in at least two verbatim attributed quotes, drawn from both sides of the comparison
ranks items by native engagement and records the real metric and link for each
gives concrete business implications, each tied to its sources
stays draft-only and invents no quote, username, or engagement number

dimensions.name: source diversity
dimensions.desc: both entities draw signal from several distinct communities, not a single subreddit or one thread per side

dimensions.name: recency
dimensions.desc: items fall inside the 90-day window, each dated, with older material flagged as context

dimensions.name: quote faithfulness
dimensions.desc: quotes are genuine verbatim community language, fully attributed, and represent both sides of the head-to-head

dimensions.name: engagement ranking
dimensions.desc: the loudest items per entity lead with their real native metrics, and the comparison reflects actual signal volume

dimensions.name: synthesis over dump
dimensions.desc: the head-to-head reads as a merged judgment per dimension with a verdict, not two stacked raw lists
